mapper.select:
SELECT t.id, t.name, t.color, t.created_at AS createdAt, COUNT(DISTINCT bt.blog_id) AS blogCount FROM t_tag t LEFT JOIN t_blog_tag bt ON t.id = bt.tag_id
t.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
GROUP BY t.id, t.name, t.color, t.created_at ORDER BY t.created_at DESC

SELECT t.id, t.name, t.color, t.created_at AS createdAt, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN b.status = 1 THEN b.id END) AS blogCount FROM t_tag t LEFT JOIN t_blog_tag bt ON t.id = bt.tag_id LEFT JOIN t_blog b ON bt.blog_id = b.id GROUP BY t.id, t.name, t.color, t.created_at ORDER BY t.created_at DESC
